title: The Medical Markup Scam

mechanism.desc: Billing for more complex treatments than those actually provided.
Charging for services or equipment never delivered to the patient.
Billing individual components of a procedure separately to increase total cost.

real_impact: 60% of all personal bankruptcies in the US are due to medical debt. Many families are 'fooled' into paying inflated prices for life-saving care.

title: The Debt Trap / Predatory Lending

mechanism.desc: Promising low rates but delivering high-interest loans at closing.
Trap borrowers in a loop of high-interest renewals with 400%+ APR.
Targeting homeowners with significant equity for loans they can't afford.

real_impact: Over 12 million Americans use payday loans annually, often losing their cars or homes to 'legal' predatory practices.

title: Defense Overcharge / Price Gouging

mechanism.desc: Contractors like Lockheed or RTX charge 1000% markups on sole-source parts.
Billing the government multiple times for the same research or labor.
Supplying substandard equipment while billing for premium military-grade hardware.

real_impact: The Pentagon recently failed its 6th audit in a row, unable to account for $3.8 trillion in assets, much of which is lost to overcharging.

title: Socialized Losses / Bailout Culture

mechanism.desc: Corporations take high risks to maximize private executive bonuses.
When risks fail, the government uses taxpayer money to prevent 'systemic collapse'.
Ensuring lobbyists write 'too big to fail' rules.

real_impact: General people lose their life savings and homes while executives at 'Too Big to Fail' firms receive record bonuses after taking bailouts.
